name: Start

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0,12 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  filter:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 60
    
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install pyyaml requests geoip2
      
      - name: Check GeoIP
        run: |
          if [ ! -f country.mmdb ]; then
            curl -L -o country.mmdb https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Loyalsoldier/geoip/release/country.mmdb
          fi
      
      - name: Run filter
        id: filter
        run: |
          python filter.py
          if [ -f out.yaml ]; then
            echo "ok=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "count=$(grep -c "type: vless" out.yaml)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "ok=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "count=0" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
      
      - name: Commit changes
        run: |
          git config --local user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git config --local user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git add out.yaml stat.txt trash.txt country.mmdb 2>/dev/null || true
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "Update proxies"
          git push
